subject: FW: Difficult weekend
body:
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 

-----Original Message-----
From: Farkas, Andrew [mailto:afarkas@islecap.com] 
Sent: Sunday, September 30, 2007 5:39 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Difficult weekend

Sorry we have not spoken. My twin godson;s bar mitzvah was yesterday,
william lauder's mother in law died and it was butch kerzner's
unveiling. I will call first thing monday. Sorry for the delay. I did,
however, meet with lehman bros and I do have a lot to talk about.
--------------------------------------------------------

notify the sender immediately by replying to the message and please
